headline: Ruag paid ransom to Akira gang, defying federal advice
summary: Swiss state defence firm Ruag paid Akira ransomware after its US subsidiary was breached, against BACS guidance.

headline: Ruag to assemble only three of four planned F-35 jets
summary: Ruag will build fewer F-35 fighters than hoped because it is too expensive.

headline: Oriane Sarrasin elected PS Vaud president
summary: New Vaud Socialist Party president targets the 12% initiative and the 2027 cantonal executive.

headline: No 10-million Switzerland initiative draws foreign attention before Sunday vote
summary: The immigration-cap federal initiative gets unusual international press echo ahead of the 7 June vote.

headline: Federal Tribunal confirms Tattes fire coordinator sentence
summary: Switzerland's Federal Tribunal upheld the sentence against the fire coordinator in the Geneva Tattes blaze.

headline: Lake Geneva hit 23.6C in May, alarming scientists
summary: Lake Geneva measured 23.6C in May, an alarming warming signal for the lake ecosystem.

headline: Israeli strike kills Lebanese brigadier general despite ceasefire
summary: Israeli strike killed Brigadier General Wassam Sabra and others, ~10 dead, days after a US-mediated truce.

headline: Iran fires missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain; US intercepts and strikes radar
summary: Iran fired seven ballistic missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain, six intercepted, as US struck Iranian radar amid fraying ceasefire.

headline: Bernadette Chirac, former French first lady, dies at 93
summary: Bernadette Chirac, widow of Jacques Chirac, died at 93; Macron confirmed.

headline: Ukraine drone strikes hit Moscow and St Petersburg
summary: Ukraine launched fresh drone attacks on Moscow and the St Petersburg region as Russia's economic forum closed.

headline: India Gen Z Cockroach protest movement reaches New Delhi
summary: The satirical Cockroach Janta Party rallied in New Delhi over exam-system failures and youth unemployment.

headline: Pope Leo XIV in Spain calls for end to polarisation
summary: Pope Leo XIV urged an end to divisive discourse during a visit to Spain.

headline: Mirra Andreeva wins French Open for first Grand Slam
summary: Russian teenager Mirra Andreeva won the French Open, her first major title.

headline: CVE-2026-9290: WP User Manager unauthenticated LFI
summary: Unauthenticated local file inclusion in WP User Manager WordPress plugin (<=2.9.17) enables PHP code execution.

headline: CVE-2026-7537: MDJM Event Management arbitrary file upload RCE
summary: WordPress MDJM plugin allows admin-level arbitrary file upload leading to RCE; public PoC available.

headline: CVE-2026-9851: Booking Package WordPress account takeover
summary: WordPress Booking Package plugin missing capability check lets Editors take over admin accounts.

headline: CVE-2026-34123: TP-Link Tapo C520WS authorization bypass
summary: Logic flaw in Tapo C520WS API authorization lets restricted accounts run sensitive operations.

headline: CVE-2026-11413: JD Cloud Box AX6600 buffer overflow, vendor silent
summary: Public remote stack buffer overflow exploit in JingDong JD Cloud Box AX6600 router; vendor unresponsive.

headline: CVE-2026-28318: SolarWinds Serv-U DoS added to CISA KEV
summary: CISA added actively exploited SolarWinds Serv-U DoS flaw CVE-2026-28318 to KEV; federal deadline 19 June.
